zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stewart , Earl of Buchan於1380年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany40歲，母親Duchess Muriella de Keith29歲。他於1411年5月1日與Lady Elizabeth Douglas結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年8月17日在法國諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stewart , Earl of Buchan于1380年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany40岁，母亲Duchess Muriella de Keith29岁。他于1411年5月1日与Lady Elizabeth Douglas结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年8月17日在法国諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John

en.lifeSummary: When John Stewart , Earl of Buchan was born in 1380, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, was 40 and his mother, Duchess Muriella de Keith, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Douglas on 1 May 1411. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 17 August 1424, in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stewart , Earl of Buchan est né en 1380, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Duchess Muriella de Keith, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Douglas le 1 mai 1411. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 août 1424, à Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stewart , Earl of Buchan 1380 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany 40 und seine Mutter Duchess Muriella de Keith 29. Er hat am 1. Mai 1411 Lady Elizabeth Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. August 1424 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart , Earl of Buchan è nato il nel 1380 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Muriella de Keith, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Douglas il 1 maggio 1411. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 agosto 1424, nel Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Stewart , Earl of Buchan(이)가 1380년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Muriella de Keith(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1411년 5월 1일 Lady Elizabeth Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 8월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른우이-수-아브르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart , Earl of Buchan nasceu em 1380, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Muriella de Keith, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Douglas em 1 de maio de 1411. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1424, em Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stewart , Earl of Buchan родился в 1380 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Muriella de Keith, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Douglas 1 мая 1411 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 17 августа 1424 г. в местности вирнеуил-сур-авр, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stewart , Earl of Buchan nació en 1380, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Duchess Muriella de Keith, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Douglas el 1 de mayo de 1411. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1424, en Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
